extract: Machamp (Japanese: カイリキー Kairiky) is a Fighting-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Machoke when traded or when exposed to a Linking Cord. It is the final form of Machop. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.) Machamp can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Machamp if it has the Gigantamax Factor.
